page_settings.seo_description: 24/7 emergency plumbing for the Inland Empire. Burst pipes, sewage backups, major leaks — we respond fast. Call (909) 600-4561.

settings.editor: 24/7 Emergency Service Available — Call (909) 600-4561
Rapid-response emergency plumbing for the Inland Empire — we're on call around the clock

When a plumbing emergency strikes — a burst pipe, major leak, or sewage backup — every minute matters. Regal Plumbing & Rooter provides rapid-response emergency service around the clock, 365 days a year. We mobilize fast, arrive with the right equipment, and get the problem under control before it causes serious damage to your home or property.

• Typically on-site within the hour
  • Burst pipe detection and emergency shutoff
  • Sewage backup and overflow response
  • Major leak control and repair
  • 24/7 availability including holidays
  • Upfront pricing even in emergencies
Immediate shutoff and repair of burst or frozen pipes before water damage spreads to walls, floors, and structural elements.
Emergency response to sewage backups and overflow situations that require immediate containment and clearance.
Rapid detection and repair of active leaks — under sinks, behind walls, or at the main line — stopping damage fast.

settings.description_text: Upfront, transparent quotes before any work begins. No hidden fees, no surprises — even in emergencies.
24/7 availability for emergencies. We arrive quickly and work efficiently to minimize damage.
Every job backed by our commitment to premium craftsmanship and lasting results.

settings.editor: Our emergency team is standing by 24/7 — including weekends and holidays
